label: Database Readonly

scope.intended_use: Postgres, Neon, Redis, or SQL-like MCP evaluation

actions.description: Allow explain plans for reviewed queries.
Writes are outside the readonly allow graph.
Updates are outside the readonly allow graph.
Deletes are outside the readonly allow graph.
DDL and schema mutations require a separate reviewed policy.

notes: Example only: do not attach to real databases without explicit resource scoping, credentials review, receipts, and EvidencePack verification.
